appliedUpdates.description: Fixed dev:electron script path from dist-electron/electron/main.js to dist-electron/main/main.js
Added critical issue documentation about preload script ES module bug

rootCause.description: The Electron preload script (src/main/preload.ts) fails to expose window.electronAPI due to ES module/CommonJS incompatibility
details: TypeScript compiler outputs ES module syntax with 'export {};'
The preload code uses 'require(electron)' which is CommonJS
In ES module context, require is not available as a global
The preload script fails silently and electronAPI is never exposed
React components call window.electronAPI methods and crash during mount
The React app fails to render - #root div remains empty
rootCause.suggestedFix: Fix preload.ts to use proper ES module imports or configure the build to output CommonJS for the preload script. Options: 1) Use dynamic import() instead of require, 2) Configure TypeScript to output CommonJS for preload, 3) Use a bundler like esbuild to create a bundled preload script
